Describe the sequence of key visual elements presented in the kitchen scene during the first ten seconds.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a man in a maroon shirt cooks at a gas stove; at 2s, a blue graphic overlay appears identifying the chef; at 8s, a package of dry rigatoni pasta is displayed on the counter near the cooked plate.

question: Outline the visible text and branding elements that appear throughout the kitchen scene.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a blue tub labeled Parmesan sits near the stove; at 2s, text reading Adam Swanson and Chef Zucca appears on screen; at 8s, the words San Remo Large Rigatoni are clearly visible on the red pasta package held near the fridge.
